statusSound.Name: Enemy Location Volume
statusSound.Description: Volume of the ping sound for the enemy location marker during combat

enemyMarker.Name: Enemy Marker
enemyMarker.Description: Show enemy position when reporting status. If disabled, the enemy marker sound will also be disabled

scanDistance.Name: Maximum scan distance
scanDistance.Description: Maximum distance to pick up any visible enemy that the player is signaling when issuing 'Contact' phrase

patrolRadius.Name: Patrol Radius
patrolRadius.Description: Maximum distance from the player the followers will patrol around

followDistance.Name: Follow Distance
followDistance.Description: Distance followers keep from the player while following.

regroupRadius.Name: Regroup Radius
regroupRadius.Description: Distance from the player at which followers automatically regroup during combat. Marksman followers use about 1.5x this radius.

goToDistance.Name: Maximum 'Go To' Distance
goToDistance.Description: Maximum distance followers will move when 'There' or 'GoForward' is issued.

enemyRemember.Name: Time to forget about the enemy (in sec.)
enemyRemember.Description: Maximum time a follower will remember an enemy. This is applied only at the beginning of a raid

healthMultiplier.Name: Squad Health Multiplier
healthMultiplier.Description: Health multiplier for the followers you spawn with. This is applied per each body part.

pickup.Name: Pickup
pickup.Description: Enable or disable the ability to recruit same-side bots during a raid.

tieredPickup.Name: Tiered Pickup
tieredPickup.Description: Use the player-vs-bot level difference rules when deciding whether a bot accepts a pickup request.

maximumPickup.Name: Maximum Pickup
maximumPickup.Description: Maximum number of non-squad same-side bots you can pick up during a raid.

recruitPickup.Name: Recruit Pickup
recruitPickup.Description: Allow picked-up followers that were successfully extracted with to send friend requests. This uses player-vs-bot level difference rules when deciding.

teamEscape.Name: Team Escape
teamEscape.Description: Allow surviving squadmates to attempt an escape after you die. Escaped teammates can return eligible follower loot and recoverable gear that would otherwise be lost.

teamEscapeUseAnyExtract.Name: Use Any Extraction Point
teamEscapeUseAnyExtract.Description: Allow the squad escape simulation to choose any usable extraction point on the map. Disable this to restrict escape routes to extraction points assigned to the player.

memberName.Name: Squad Member {0} Nickname
memberName.Description: Set a custom nickname for this Squad member. Leave blank for default

memberVoice.Name: Squad Member {0} Voice
memberVoice.Description: Set what voice this member should use.

memberUniformTop.Name: Squad Member {0} Top
memberUniformTop.Description: Set what the top clothes for this member should be. Leave blank for default

memberUniformBottom.Name: Squad Member {0} Bottom
memberUniformBottom.Description: Set what the pants for this member should be. Leave blank for default

equipmentLock.Name: Lock Squad Equipment
equipmentLock.Description: Locks the equipment of the squad members.

loadoutManagementSimple.Name: Simple
loadoutManagementSimple.Description: Create teammate loadouts freely using gear from your stash as a template, without consuming any items. Teammate gear is protected: it is not lost on death and cannot be looted.

loadoutManagementRestricted.Name: Restricted
loadoutManagementRestricted.Description: Teammate loadouts must use gear from your stash or be purchased through the kit buyout system. Gear is still protected: it is not lost on death and cannot be looted.

loadoutManagementImmersive.Name: Immersive
loadoutManagementImmersive.Description: Same as Restricted, but teammate gear behaves like real raid equipment. Equipment can become damaged, dead teammates lose their gear, and their bodies can be looted.

loadoutManagementExtreme.Name: Realistic
loadoutManagementExtreme.Description: Same as Immersive, but secure containers are no longer automatically managed for teammates. You are fully responsible for configuring them yourself.

npcSendMessage.Name: Raid End Messages
npcSendMessage.Description: Followers will send message at the end of the raid based on conditions such as if all made it out or if you picked up a follower and kept him alive. Return items messages are excluded

friendlyPMC.Name: Friendly PMC Side
friendlyPMC.Description: Should PMC Bots of the same side always be friendly to each other. Turn this off would let the normal game aggro system decide if same side bots will be friendly to you or not.

badGuy.Name: Bad Guy
badGuy.Description: Should the player be hostile to all PMC bots, regardless of faction

PmcArmbands.Name: PMC Faction Arm Bands
PmcArmbands.Description: Should PMC bots have armbands (red for BEARs, blue for USECs).

englishBear.Name: BEARs speak English
englishBear.Description: Should BEAR bots speak English only

pingSquad.Name: Status Report Shortcut
pingSquad.Description: Alternative shortcut key for the Status Report quick phrase

pingRadioVolume.Name: Report Status Volume
pingRadioVolume.Description: Volume of the radio sound when triggering report status

pingTime.Name: Report Status Display Time
pingTime.Description: Time in seconds to display the followers status

enemyContact.Name: Enemy Contact Shortcut
enemyContact.Description: Alternative shortcut key for the Contact quick phrase

overThere.Name: Over There Shortcut
overThere.Description: Alternative shortcut key for the Over There quick gesture

hideUnsupportedCommands.Name: Hide Unsupported Commands
hideUnsupportedCommands.Description: Hide phrases for which no command is actually registered in the game's gestures menu

botTeleport.Name: Teleport Followers
botTeleport.Description: Teleport all followers to the player's position

botHeal.Name: Heal Followers
botHeal.Description: Heal all followers and restore blacked limbs.

botPrefetch.Name: Prefetch follower data
botPrefetch.Description: Prefetch follower data to reduce the time it takes to spawn them. If you experience problems with followers spawning, disable this option and try again. Take note that this can increase the spawn time.

botTalk.Name: Followers trash talk
botTalk.Description: Frequency at which a follower will trash talk during combat. Set to 0 to disable.

spawnPoint.Name: Use Coop Spawn Point
spawnPoint.Description: Use Coop Spawn Points when spawning with followers.

battleRecorder.Name: Battle Recorder
battleRecorder.Description: Write deep follower combat timelines to a dedicated JSONL file for raid analysis.

battleRecorderSnapshotIntervalMs.Name: Battle Recorder Snapshot Interval (ms)
battleRecorderSnapshotIntervalMs.Description: Snapshot cadence for follower battle recorder positional samples.
